subcodes.first_line: Praise and glory befit the chosen ones of the Court of the All-Desired One, who in the realm of earthly existence, despite the clamor of the divines [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر و ثنا اولیاء حضرت مقصودیرا لایق و سزا که در ناسوت انشا مع ضوضاء علما و
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power of love, @love as fire, @work as worship
